failure_modes.cause: Local cooling in long reactor (19m) or product crystallization at 0.067 M concentration
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-traced tubing for all lines and a pre-heating coil

failure_modes.cause: Extremely low flow rate (0.11 mL/min) leading to poor pump precision and residence time distribution (RTD) variance
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pulse dampener or use a high-precision syringe pump

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged residence time (76.5 min) at 120°C causing DES decomposition
failure_modes.mitigation: Perform a stability study of the TBAB/EG mixture at 120°C for 120 min

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage due to DES crystallization stops all flow
Pump seal — failure at low Q leads to loss of pressure and boiling
validation_experiments: Run pure TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C for 2 hours; analyze via NMR/GC for decomposition products
Perform a tracer study (e.g., using a dye) to validate RTD and ensure no stagnant zones in the 19m coil
Stress test BPR by cycling temperature from 20°C to 120°C to check for crystallization-induced sticking
